charity.focus: Children's health (CMN Hospitals), hunger relief (Feeding America), community policing

privacy.s: 1 documented breach affecting 185,256 accounts (HIBP); latest breach 2026-04-08.

wiki.extract: 7-Eleven, Inc. is an American convenience store chain, headquartered in Irving, Texas. It is a wholly owned subsidiary of Seven-Eleven Japan, which in turn is owned by the retail holdings company Seven & I Holdings, a Japanese retail holding company.

cases.caseName: Parra-Ochoa v. 7-Eleven, Inc., a Texas corporation

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee slipped and fell in the kitchen, resulting in a fractured wrist.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was operating a cash register when they tripped and fell. They were hospitalized with a left knee injury.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by other falling object  n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was servicing equipment around a storage rack. They went to move the rack when the rack's leg collapsed and caught the employee's right hand between the bottom of the leg and the ground. The employee sustained an amputation to their little fingertip.

sampleRecords.nature: Cuts, lacerations, punctures without injury to internal structures
sampleRecords.event_description: Stabbing, cutting, slashing by other person
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee and a customer were in a verbal altercation that escalated to a physical altercation and the employee was stabbed by a knife once in the stomach.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee tripped over a box and sustained a fractured hip. They were hospitalized.
